source: PokéAPI REST summarized for offline runtime use

abilities.name: Damp
abilities.effect: Prevents Self-Destruct, Explosion, and Aftermath from working while the Pokémon is in battle.
abilities.flavor_text: The Pokémon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokémon from using explosive moves such as Self-Destruct.

abilities.name: Water Absorb
abilities.effect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.flavor_text: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: Unaware
abilities.effect: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.
abilities.flavor_text: When attacking, the Pokémon ignores the target's stat changes.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.effect: Strengthens Water moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Moxie
abilities.effect: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokémon.
abilities.flavor_text: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it shows moxie, which boosts its Attack stat.

abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Moxie

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.effect: Strengthens Fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Fire-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.effect: Protects against Fire moves.  Once one has been blocked, the Pokémon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5× damage until it leaves battle.
abilities.flavor_text: If hit by a Fire-type move, the Pokémon absorbs the flames and uses them to power up its own Fire-type moves.

abilities.name: Overgrow
abilities.effect: Strengthens Grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.flavor_text: Powers up Grass-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Bulletproof
abilities.effect: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
abilities.flavor_text: Protects the Pokémon from ball and bomb moves.

abilities.name: Poison Point
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.flavor_text: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.effect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.
abilities.flavor_text: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.
